_comment: Per-detector-class catalog versions. Bump a class when you add/strengthen detection for it: WU2 re-opens only the 'safe' conclusions that relied on THAT class, and the coverage layer (state.sh) re-audits broadly because the aggregate (sum of these) advances on any bump. Classes mirror the sink-class enum. The legacy single-integer VERSION file is the fallback when this map is unreadable.
